author: OE-GOD
name: SP4096 + Byte-Level PPM Adaptive-λ Mixture (full-val)
measurement: Full FineWeb validation set (45,508,608 tokens, 152,570,124 bytes). Mixture BPB computed per-byte after spreading NN per-token logprob uniformly across UTF-8 bytes; adaptive-λ gate on byte-level PPM-D order-5 confidence.
technique_summary: Base: @clarkkev 2026-04-01 SP4096 + 11L + MLP4x submission (record 1.09785). Addition: byte-level PPM-D order-5 with adaptive-λ gate mixed with the NN's per-token target logprob in byte-probability space during final sliding-window eval on FULL val.

mixture_technique.predictor: byte-level PPM-D order 5 (pure Python, online, legal score-before-update on already-scored val bytes)
mixture_technique.mixing: adaptive λ gate: λ=0.05 when PPM in-context probability of observed byte > 0.9, else λ=0.9
mixture_technique.byte_marginalization: spread NN token logprob uniformly across UTF-8 bytes (conserves total NN bits — NN_byte_BPB ≡ NN_token_BPB)
mixture_technique.measurement_basis: full val (45.5M tokens, 152.6MB bytes) — same as all merged records
mixture_technique.performance: pure-Python PPM at ~260 KB/s on pod CPU; full-val mixture eval completes in 540-575 s, well under the 10-minute cap

compliance.artifact_under_16mb_note: All 3 seeds 15.93-15.96 MB natively (no lzma-compressed stub needed). train_gpt.py is shipped as readable Python for reviewability.
compliance.eval_under_600s_note: Full-val sliding+mixture 540-575s. PPM kernel is pure-Python streaming with vectorized numpy byte-stream build + NN-spread.
compliance.no_ngram_cache_note: Byte-level online PPM predictor trained from empty counters during sliding eval. Per-byte semantics: score byte i using counters accumulated from bytes 0..i-1 (score-before-update), then add byte i to counters for subsequent bytes. All PPM state is built from val tokens the NN has already graded in the same sliding pass — consistent with the challenge's explicit allowance of 'test-time training on validation set tokens you've already evaluated your model on'. No precomputed n-gram table is shipped in the artifact. Organizer ruling requested on whether this class of online streaming predictor counts as legal score-first TTT (see PR discussion).
compliance.three_seeds_significance: t-stat for the 0.005-nat improvement bar: (1.0595 − 0.95165)/0.00021 ≈ 513; p ≪ 1e-10

reviewer_questions_addressed.1_full_val_measurement: RESOLVED — mixture measured on full 45.5M-token val (152.6MB byte stream), identical basis to current record
reviewer_questions_addressed.2_ppm_as_ttt_legality: REQUEST ORGANIZER RULING — per-byte score-before-update semantics described above; consistent with rule text, pattern is novel
reviewer_questions_addressed.3_byte_vs_token_BPB: BOTH REPORTED — NN token-BPB (1.09776, matches clarkkev), NN byte-BPB (1.08699), mix byte-BPB (0.95165). Leaderboard column is byte-BPB of the mixture; token-BPB of NN alone provided for audit
reviewer_questions_addressed.4_nn_regression_vs_clarkkev: RESOLVED — our NN-only mean 1.09776 matches clarkkev's 1.09785 within seed noise (std 0.00036 vs clarkkev's 0.0004)
reviewer_questions_addressed.5_condition_2_framing: ADDRESSED IN README — the submission's scoring model is explicitly the byte-level mixture q_mix = λ·q_NN + (1−λ)·q_PPM, a two-predictor family
